lessons.title: Reading Files
lessons.description: Learn how to read entire files or line by line.

lessons.title: Writing to Files
lessons.description: Write data to files and create new files.

lessons.title: Appending to Files
lessons.description: Add content to existing files without overwriting.

lessons.title: File Information and Checks
lessons.description: Check if a file exists, get file size, permissions, and more.

lessons.title: Deleting and Renaming Files
lessons.description: Remove files and change their names.

lessons.title: File Permissions and Ownership
lessons.description: Understand and change file permissions with chmod.
